case_title: LISA FREDERIKSEN VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, OFFICE OF THE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FREDERIKSEN, LISA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FREDERIKSEN, LISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY $1,236.13 PRINCIPAL, $5.71 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,466.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FREDERIKSEN, LISA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY
